But for the pillars that we care about, we are in the top three or close to.
So something else we gathered from this crunch data is for these particular prompts and questions, Galileo is not showing up in ChatGPT, but the competitors are.

So generally the idea is to take all of these questions and all of these queries essentially map them to our existing published content and upcoming content and see whether we can add these as H2s or H3s and essentially just answer the question within content itself.
It's also a good source for content refreshes because we can directly sort of cite these queries within content itself and hopefully see a boost in LLM visibility.
